chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7224 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.30555/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.03.2025 Mr. Ali Raza, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Sarwar Jamali, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioner the controversy is covered by the judgment dated 24.08.2023 passed by Division Bench of this court in CP D 7493 of 2021 and connected matters. The said judgment is binding, therefore, this petition is dismissed mutatis mutandis application of the ratio so illumined, however, subject to right of appeal to the petitioner. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
